ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(OR(ISCHANGED( Amount__c), ISCHANGED( Balance__c), ISCHANGED( Credit__c), ISCHANGED( Debit__c), ISCHANGED( Discount_Amount__c), ISCHANGED( Fees__c), ISCHANGED( Restock_Tax__c), ISCHANGED( Shipping_Amount__c), ISCHANGED( Shipping_Tax__c), ISCHANGED( Tax_Amount__c)),NOT(ISCHANGED(Posted__c )) , Posted__c = true)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please Un-post the Credit Note to manage
